revision.comment: HouseBlaster moved page [[Template:YearInCountryPortalBox/make]] to [[Template:Year in country portal box/make]]: spacing per [[WP:TPN]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if: {{{1|}}}<!-- #We have a country parameter # If it contains "%%", then it is two portal # names, which need to be split -->| {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|%%|nomatch=notmatched}}| notmatched<!-- -->|<!-- # No "%%", so it's just one entry -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|Geography<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a "%%", so it's two portal names -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }} }}<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }} }}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#if: {{{year|}}}<!-- -->| {{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Subtemplate to {{tl|YearInCountryPortalBox}} }} </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if: {{{1|}}}<!-- #We have a country parameter # If it contains "%%", then it is two portal # names, which need to be split -->| {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|%%|nomatch=notmatched}}| notmatched<!-- -->|<!-- # No "%%", so it's just one entry -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|Geography<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a "%%", so it's two portal names -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }} }}<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }} }}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#if: {{{year|}}}<!-- -->| {{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Subtemplate to {{tl|YearInCountryPortalBox}} }} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if: {{{1|}}}<!-- #We have a country parameter # If it contains "%%", then it is two portal # names, which need to be split -->| {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|%%|nomatch=notmatched}}| notmatched<!-- -->|<!-- # No "%%", so it's just one entry -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|Geography<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a "%%", so it's two portal names -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }} }}<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }} }}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#if: {{{year|}}}<!-- -->| {{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Subtemplate to {{tl|YearInCountryPortalBox}} }} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if: {{{1|}}}<!-- #We have a country parameter # If it contains "%%", then it is two portal # names, which need to be split -->| {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|%%|nomatch=notmatched}}| notmatched<!-- -->|<!-- # No "%%", so it's just one entry -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|Geography<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a "%%", so it's two portal names -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }} }}<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }} }}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#if: {{{year|}}}<!-- -->| {{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Subtemplate to {{tl|YearInCountryPortalBox}} }} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if: {{{1|}}}<!-- #We have a country parameter # If it contains "%%", then it is two portal # names, which need to be split -->| {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|%%|nomatch=notmatched}}| notmatched<!-- -->|<!-- # No "%%", so it's just one entry -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|Geography<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a "%%", so it's two portal names -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }} }}<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }} }}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#if: {{{year|}}}<!-- -->| {{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Subtemplate to {{tl|YearInCountryPortalBox}} }} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: HouseBlaster moved page [[Template:YearInCountryPortalBox/make]] to [[Template:Year in country portal box/make]]: spacing per [[WP:TPN]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if: {{{1|}}}<!-- #We have a country parameter # If it contains "%%", then it is two portal # names, which need to be split -->| {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|%%|nomatch=notmatched}}| notmatched<!-- -->|<!-- # No "%%", so it's just one entry -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|Geography<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a "%%", so it's two portal names -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }} }}<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }} }}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#if: {{{year|}}}<!-- -->| {{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Subtemplate to {{tl|YearInCountryPortalBox}} }} </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if: {{{1|}}}<!-- #We have a country parameter # If it contains "%%", then it is two portal # names, which need to be split -->| {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|%%|nomatch=notmatched}}| notmatched<!-- -->|<!-- # No "%%", so it's just one entry -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|Geography<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a "%%", so it's two portal names -->{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|1|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} - 1}} }} }}<!-- -->|{{#ifexist:Portal:{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }}|{{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1|}}}|{{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|%%}} + 2}} }} }}<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#if: {{{year|}}}<!-- -->| {{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|{{Portal|nominimum=yes<!-- -->|History<!-- -->|{{#invoke:FindYDCportal|findydcportal|{{{year|}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Subtemplate to {{tl|YearInCountryPortalBox}} }} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
